category_title: Six-year-old students with EBD, ADHD, and ODD who exhibit noncompliance, aggression, and disrobing during difficult academic tasks
scenario_title: Responding to a task demand for a difficult academic activity
minimal_context: Axel is sitting in his individual work area being asked to complete a multistep academic worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Axel, it is time for your worksheet. First, write your name at the top, and then circle the pictures.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to follow the directions and do your work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Throws his pencil out of the work area) It's too hard!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please stop throwing things and start your assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Screams a swear word, removes his shoes and socks, and makes an obscene gesture at the tutor)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Axel, it is time for your worksheet. First, write your name at the top, and then circle the pictures.

STUDENT: No! I'm not doing it!

TUTOR: You need to follow the directions and do your work.

STUDENT: (Throws his pencil out of the work area) It's too hard!

TUTOR: Please stop throwing things and start your assignment.

STUDENT: (Screams a swear word, removes his shoes and socks, and makes an obscene gesture at the tutor)

task.content: work on non-preferred tasks and academic activities he perceived to be difficult

context.environment: individual work area in a self-contained special education classroom
context.materials: consequence maps, calm down schedule, clipboard

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: in response to a task demand
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: removed his shoes and socks, swore at an adult, threw objects out of his individual work area, or hit an adult

behavior_patterns.condition: When Axel did not want to comply with a task demand or teacher request
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: he removed his clothes, screamed swear words, made obscene gestures towards staff and students, and threw classroom materials
behavior_patterns.internal_state: difficulty expressing frustration and other emotions appropriately
